title: hesperis matronalis subsp. schurii
intro: Hesperis matronalis subsp. schurii is a subspecies of the Dame's Rocket (Hesperis matronalis), a flowering plant native to Europe. It is a biennial herb used in traditional medicine, primarily valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of glycosides, flavonoids, and essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Hesperis matronalis subsp. schurii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory symptoms, and promoting skin health.
